title: Add zcash_primitives dep to workspace Cargo.toml
description:
Add zcash_primitives to the workspace [dependencies] in the root Cargo.toml and to wallet/Cargo.toml.

Use the same librustzcash git rev already in use (d8491512). Pattern:
  zcash_primitives = { git = 'https://github.com/zcash/librustzcash', rev = 'd8491512' }

Also add zcash_protocol (needed for MemoBytes and Zatoshis) and incrementalmerkletree (needed for IncrementalWitness serialization).

Steps:
1. Spawn a research subagent to find the exact rev string and existing git deps in Cargo.toml
2. Add the deps
3. Run cargo check --workspace and fix any version conflicts
4. Verify no core2 transitive dep appears (the known yanked crate) — cargo tree -i core2
5. Run cargo test --workspace to confirm nothing regressed

Defensive: if cargo tree shows a version conflict, spawn a second subagent to resolve it before proceeding. Do not guess — read the existing lockfile.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build --workspace succeeds; cargo tree -p nie-wallet | grep zcash_primitives shows the correct rev; no core2 dep
